target:
Waaahhh!!!  
Hama Jun and Tōdai Shou!

The shadows are close!  
Shinpei, catch me!!

Ah ah, so lively…  
Good meal material…

(Stay calm! The human-shaped body is an illusion.  
The shadow's true form lies in the shadows beneath them!)

(Let your body relax, as taught.  
Distribute power 3 to the right hand and 7 to the left.)

…Big one, Shinpei-kun.  
You were lively too?

Shinpei… he defeated the shadow!?  
But wait, that Ushio--!

Ushi-o came back?  
We had a meeting yesterday…

So the good shadows and bad ones fought…  
Is Ushio a good shadow?
Relax! I'll take care of all the bad shadows!!!
Wait, why are you still on the tree?!
Oh… I can't get down!!! You brought me here!!
Shinpei's the type to be dominated by someone!!

Ushio's presence has vanished…  
Finally, I'm glad to get rid of that girl…

(The gun… it's gone.  
That's right, because Ushio vanished…)

By the way, since you just came back…  
Shinpei, are you on a cliffhanger?

(The Event Horizon!!!  
The very edge of the loop's aftermath!  
This is bad!!)

(Attack this!!!  
You've been watching me as a bird all along!?!)
(Oh no, I can't take down even one stray shadow alone…)
It's okay, Aki. I'll protect you!!

Don't give up!!  
If I die, everything ends!  
Stay calm!!!
There must be something… some way out of this situation!!
Just one thing, please tell me.

You too.  
Can you carry over the copied data?  
Right?!

Then, you…
On that day,
Did you eat the people in the shrine?

The power that came back then…
Was used to chase you!
Your life… I'll cut it here.
No, maybe Haine stopped them. But why…?
(Everything's gone… The strays too. Why was I saved?)
Yes… the situation has changed!! Let's gather. Yes, we need to re-plan our strategy!
Damn it! Can't connect!! It's out of range here!!!
How about the northeastern part… Tiger Island?
An island that's only accessible during low tide.
Yes, it'll be low tide in 30 minutes.
Mio and Sou have been informed… We'll regroup at Kofune before heading over.
Understood, then let's meet at Tiger Island in 30 minutes.

Yes… Professor…
See you in thirty minutes.
Let's get down the mountain right away!!! This place is dangerous!
Haine. When did you copy that body?
You should be thinking too… Ushio's memories don't include the fake loop holes.
Don't let Shinpei's life reach the ceremony tomorrow. Move, Shide.
Listen! This is a secret operation. Don't tell the adults!
Yosh!! I understand!!! It's so cool!!!!
…The real Butchie was killed. You didn't say anything, did you? Me!
That's good… No need to scare them.
Will those kids keep it a secret about the shadows?
It's okay. No one will believe them anyway.
The ground there… blood is on it! It's still fresh!!
There was a murder here. The shadow from before… Butchie's doing!

That ground… There's blood on it!  
It's still new!!

…There was a murder here…  
Probably from that shadow earlier… Butchy's doing…

…34 years old… female…
Not from this island…
Lives in Osaka… tourist… I see.

No signs of a doll-like stain on her.
That tourist was carried away…

Damn…!!
Haine's eating more people than usual to heal his wound from yesterday…

You idiot…!
Even if he eats others, it won't heal…

Shiori Kobayakawa and Hoine Minakata too…
The originals aren't around anymore…

Huh?!
Did I just say something…?

No… wait! From Nagumo-sensei's instructions!
Let's regroup with everyone as planned.
